---
title: "Skewed Score: A statistical framework to assess autograders"
description: "arXiv, 2025"
date: 2025-01-01
venue: "arXiv"
citation-text: "Magda Dubois*, Harry Coppock*, Mario Giulianelli, Timo Flesch, Lennart Luettgau, Cozmin Ududec, Skewed Score: A statistical framework to assess autograders, arXiv, 2025"
---
